SUBMIT AN EVENT

Know about an OKC event we're missing? Submit it below. All submissions are reviewed and verified against the official event source before being added to the calendar. Please include a link to the official event page or ticketing site so we can confirm the details.

Verification process: Every submission is checked against the official source URL you provide. Events are verified for correct date, venue, and details before being added. Submissions without a verifiable source link will not be published. The calendar is updated nightly — verified submissions typically appear within 24 hours.

ABOUT THIS CALENDAR

The OKC Super Calendar aggregates events from 1,000+ local sources including VisitOKC, Paycom Center, Bricktown OKC, The Yale Theater, Paseo Arts District, Plaza District, and many more. Hardcoded events are researched and confirmed at time of publication. Live sources are refreshed nightly via automated search — new events, cancellations, and schedule changes discovered overnight are incorporated into the next day's update.

PLEASE VERIFY BEFORE YOU GO

Event details — including dates, times, venues, and ticket availability — are subject to change. We strongly encourage you to confirm all event information directly with the ticketing provider or venue before making travel arrangements or purchasing tickets. Cancellations, rescheduling, and venue changes can occur at any time without prior notice to this calendar.

DIRECT SOURCES

For the most up-to-date information, visit the official source websites linked on each event card.

OKC Super Calendar • Oklahoma City, OK • Calendar data refreshed nightly • Not affiliated with any venue or event organizer •
